mapper.select: SELECT employee_id, leave_date, leave_type, hours FROM leave_records WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND leave_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT * FROM leave_records WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND ((start_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (end_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (start_date <= #{startDate} AND end_date >= #{endDate}))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM ( SELECT employee_id FROM employee_shifts WHERE shift_date = CURRENT_DATE AND shift_type = 'OFF' UNION SELECT employee_id FROM leave_records WHERE CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ) as total_off;
